text:
The unnamed children of Edward Elric and Winry Rockbell, who appear in the final pages of the manga and the end credits of the 2009 anime.

Little information exists on Edward and Winry's children, other than their appearance. Their son looks to be about 2 or 3, with their daughter seemingly closer to 6 months old, to a year. Their pictures are shown at the end of the series.
